name: churn-autopsy
description: 🔬 ChurnAutopsy — Not just that they churned. Why they churned. AI-powered churn analysis for B2B SaaS.

description: 📊 TechDebtLedger — Track technical debt as a financial number. Give your CTO a number to show the CFO.

name: meeting-receipt
description: 🧾 MeetingReceipt — AI that sends a receipt after every meeting with duration, attendees, estimated salary cost, and a snarky summary.

name: velocity-truth
